channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar - Current
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records with status Current from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Furosemide Injection (25021-311-02)
item.description: Furosemide, Injection, 10 mg/1 mL (NDC 25021-311-02) Status: Current Updated: 2026-04-28 Company: Gland Pharma Limited Distributed by Sagent Pharmaceuticals: 1-866-625-1618, Discontinued product
